releaseBuild.signingNote: Replace debug signing in android/app/build.gradle.kts with a release keystore before production upload.

firebaseSetup.command: dart pub global activate flutterfire_cli && flutterfire configure

privacyPolicyUrl: Host hosting/public/privacy.html via Firebase Hosting, then paste the URL in Play Console.
shortDescription: Tap bombs, launch them to the edge, and clear the board!
fullDescription: Bombs & Puzzles is a relaxing logic puzzle with a satisfying boom. Tap a bomb and watch it slide toward the screen edge and explode. Plan the order carefully — if another bomb blocks the path, you lose a life. Three lives per stage, 1200 unique handcrafted-style procedural levels, no timers, free to play with family-safe ads.
